description_long: This is a weathered, rectangular wooden storage box with visible signs of age and use, such as dark stains, scratches, and worn edges. The box is reinforced at the corners with black metal brackets, adding structural strength and a rugged appearance. The wood grain is prominent, and the surface is marked by a combination of horizontal planks on the top and vertical planks on the sides. Two of the sides feature a single vertical wooden slat running down the center, possibly for added support or as a design element. There are no visible handles, locks, or labeling areas, and the box appears to have a simple, flat, removable lid. The overall look suggests it is suitable for utilitarian storage in garages, workshops, or outdoor urban environments.
description: A rugged, weathered wooden storage box with black metal corner reinforcements and a flat, plank-style lid. The box shows signs of heavy use and is designed for practical storage in urban or industrial settings.
description_view_0: The front view shows a stained wooden surface with black metal corner brackets and no visible handles or slats.
description_view_1: This side view reveals a central vertical wooden slat running down the middle, with the same metal corner reinforcements and plank texture.
description_view_2: The rear view is similar to the front, lacking the central slat and showing the same weathered wood and metal brackets.
description_view_3: This side view mirrors view 1, with a central vertical slat and reinforced corners.
